query: SELECT b.*, h.hostName, h.email as hostEmail FROM bookings b LEFT JOIN host_listings h ON b.hostId = h.id WHERE (b.guestName LIKE '%Ari%' OR b.guestEmail LIKE '%ari%') ORDER BY b.createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user JF4SDJ8UQnAgkD3.root --database mkW6ExSEHJcqGWsa6M4fqn --execute SELECT b.*, h.hostName, h.email as hostEmail FROM bookings b LEFT JOIN host_listings h ON b.hostId = h.id WHERE (b.guestName LIKE '%Ari%' OR b.guestEmail LIKE '%ari%') ORDER BY b.createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
